tickets.title: Procedural slot naming
tickets.summary: Adjective/nickname word packs for auto slot display names; manual override wins. After T-071 ORBAT numbering.

tickets.title: MC shell layout polish
tickets.summary: Toolbelt placement, Attributes modal grouping, stub tool visibility — layout UX without full T-082 field parity.

tickets.title: Perfect water — exact hydrology + water placement guard
tickets.summary: Far-future polish on the T-090.1.2.5.x water composite (operator: good-enough 2026-07-03, ship @ 1c07d97a). (a) Exact water geometry: Eden.ent water entities via Workbench export or pak-codec crack (zlib/zstd/brotli/LZ4 all fail today), .Rivers/*_flow.edds placements, PWLN/Eden.smap leads — full trail in .ai/artifacts/t090_1_2_5_2_source_spike.json; replaces the appearance classifier with pixel-perfect ocean/lake/river masks. (b) Editor placement guard: block/warn placing units in ocean or large water bodies in the Mission Creator (ship the water mask to the frontend alongside the DEM). Minor mask misses acceptable — missions get playtested.

tickets.title: Arma 3 map architecture study
tickets.summary: A3 2D Arcade map architecture study @ `b1949182` — live GLandscape draw, no basemap tiles; pivot T-090 to export+vectors. Report: .ai/artifacts/t144_arma3_map_architecture_report.md.

tickets.title: Enfusion Asset Data Exporter Plugin
tickets.summary: Extract vehicles, weapons, uniforms, and ammo to JSON. Critical: Must parse vehicle turrets to trace compatible magazine/ammo types so the web UI knows exactly what fits. Skip static objects (sandbags, fences).

tickets.title: Asset Browser Data Wiring
tickets.summary: Hook up the exported Enfusion JSON to the frontend Asset Browser so categorized vehicles and crates are draggable onto the map.

tickets.title: Simplified Squad Connections
tickets.summary: Visual 2D lines linking soldiers exclusively to a Squad Leader to define squad hierarchies. Interconnected with the ORBAT Manager modal data.

tickets.title: Shift+Drag Rotation Tool
tickets.summary: Hold Shift and drag the mouse to rotate a selected unit's 2D facing direction.

tickets.title: Forest Mass Polygon Smoothing
tickets.summary: Upgrade the V1 blocky Path B forest hulls. Increase the density grid resolution (e.g., down to 8m) and apply a curve-smoothing algorithm (like Chaikin's) to the marching squares output so the forest edges look like natural, curved cartography.

tickets.title: Rust/Wasm Doc Core (Yjs replacement)
tickets.summary: Rewrite the Go backend to Rust (Axum + sqlx) and move the mission document core into a Rust/wasm yrs doc. The F1->F4 flip made the yrs wasm doc authoritative and removed yjs + y-indexeddb from the app.
impact: Architecture rewrite to replace Go with Rust for memory safety

tickets.title: WebGPU (wgpu/wasm) render engine spike - replace Deck.gl
tickets.summary: wgpu Mission Creator engine program (spike SHIPPED @ 94261dd6; W0/T-151.0 @ f019512d; W1/T-151.1 @ 3ab81587; W2/T-151.2 @ a51e9dcb; W3/T-151.3 @ 32bf5ac5 — residency + building GPU on wgpu; verify .ai/artifacts/t151_3_verify_log.md). Slices W4-W9 wire vector layers and editor interaction onto the engine; Deck stays the oracle until T-151.9. Hub: t151_wgpu_engine_program.md. Execution: standing worktree tbd-reforger-wgpu-spike/ only; manual Claude prompts; no per-slice branches or ticket run.
impact: Replace Deck.gl with a wgpu/wasm engine reading the yrs core directly for zero-copy render at scale
